start_message: 👋 Welcome to the bot for monitoring and getting information about Starknet staking! I will help you: ✅ Monitor information about validators and delegators. ✅ Receive up-to-date data on rewards. ✅ Manage notifications for important events. Available commands: ➕ Add Information — Add a validator or delegator address for monitoring. ❌ Delete Information — Remove a validator or delegator address from monitoring. 📊 Full Information — Get detailed information about your staking. ℹ️ Validator Information — Get basic information about a validator. 🎁 Reward Information — Find out the latest data about your rewards. 🔔 Configure Notifications — Enable or disable notifications about rewards. ❓ Available Commands — View the list of all available commands. 🌐 Configure Language — Select the language for the bot. 📞 Contact Administration — Send a message to the administrator.
help_message: 📜 List of Available Commands: ➕ Add Information — Add a validator or delegator address for monitoring. This allows you to track their activity and rewards. ❌ Delete Information — Remove a validator or delegator address from monitoring that is no longer needed. 📊 Full Information — Get detailed information about all tracked addresses, including activity and rewards. ℹ️ Validator Information — Retrieve basic information about a specific validator you are monitoring. 🎁 Reward Information — Get the latest data about rewards available for claiming. 🔔 Configure Notifications — Set up notifications to stay informed about important events, such as reward availability. ❓ Available Commands — View this list of commands to find the functionality you need. 🌐 Configure Language — Change the bot's language to one convenient for you. 📞 Contact Administration — Send a message to the bot's administrators for help or inquiries.
block_message: ⛔ You are blocked. You no longer have access to the bot.
can_unstake: Validator has not initiated an unstake tokens.✅
enter_validator_address_2: Enter the validator address or use the default address button
invalid_choice: Unknown command. Please use ❓ Available commands for a list of available commands.
invalid_language_choice: The specified language is not supported. Available languages: English, Русский, Українська, 中文, 한국어, Español, Deutsch, Polski
contact_admin_prompt: ✉️ Contact the administrator: Please enter your message for the administrator. Only text messages are supported. To cancel, use the Cancel button.
message_sent_to_admin: Your message has been successfully sent to the administrator.
message_sent_to_user: Message to the user has been successfully sent.
reply_to_admin_prompt: To reply to the administrator, click 'Reply' to this message
reply_to_user_prompt: To reply to the user, click 'Reply' to this message
choose_add_type: 🌟 Choose what you want to add: 👨‍💻 Validator: is someone who has set up their own node and delegated at least 20,000 STRK tokens. To track information about a validator, you will only need to add the validator address because the staking contract is already known. 🤝 Delegator: is someone who has joined an existing pool and delegates their tokens to one of the validators. To track information about a delegator, you will need to add the address from which the tokens were delegated and the address of the pool to which the tokens were delegated.
enter_delegate_address: 🏦 Enter the delegator address: This is your own address from which the tokens were delegated. Please make sure you enter the correct address.
enter_validator_address: 🏦 Enter the validator address: This is your own address used for delegating tokens. Please ensure you are entering the correct address.
enter_pool_address: 🏊🏻‍♂️ Enter the validator pool address: This is the address of the pool to which you delegated your tokens. Please double-check the address before entering.
confirm_validator_info: 🔍 Please review the entered information: 🏦 Validator Address: {validator_address} 📜 Staking Contract Address: {pool_address} 💾 Press 'Save' to confirm or ❌ 'Cancel' to abort.
confirm_delegate_info: 🔍 Please review the entered information: 💳 Delegator Address: {delegate_address} 🛡 Validator (Staker) Address: {staker_address} 💾 Press Save to confirm or ❌ Cancel to abort.
info_limit_reached: You have already saved 4 addresses. Delete one to add a new one.
choose_delete_option: Choose what you want to delete:
all_info_deleted: All data has been successfully deleted! ✅
choose_address_to_delete: Choose the address you want to delete:
no_addresses_to_delete: You have no saved addresses to delete.
no_addresses_to_parse: You have no saved addresses for searching information. Please add an address first using ➕ Add Information
tracking_data_empty: Empty data. You need to contact the admin via /contact_admin
give_user_id_or_username: Please provide the user ID or username of the user you want to ban. 🛑
operation_not_allowed: You do not have permission to perform this operation. ❌
confirm_ban_user: Are you sure you want to ban the user? ⚠️
user_blocked_success: The user has been successfully banned. 🎉
confirm_unban_user: Are you sure you want to unban this user? ⚠️
invalid_input: ❌ Invalid input. Please try again. You must enter either an integer (e.g., 100) or a decimal number (e.g., 100.2).
invalid_threshold: ❌ The threshold must be greater than 0! Please try again.
threshold_reset_success: ✅ The STRK token claim threshold has been successfully reset! The bot will no longer send claim notifications.
threshold_set_success: ✅ The STRK token claim threshold has been successfully set to {0}! The bot will now send notifications when the number of your tokens reaches this value in any of the pools you specified in ➕ Add Information.
enter_claim_threshold: 📈 Enter the claim threshold for STRK tokens: This is the minimum amount of tokens at which the bot will send you notifications about claiming. It can be a whole number (e.g., 100) or a decimal (e.g., 100.2).
claim_notification_success_disable: ✅ Notifications successfully disabled! The bot will no longer send you reminders about claiming.
claim_threshold_is_zero: ❌ You have not enabled the notification feature for reaching the minimum threshold of STRK tokens available for claiming.
no_addresses_to_parse_info: ❌ You have no added validators or delegators in ➕ Add Information. 📉 The bot cannot send you notifications about STRK token claim as no addresses were saved. 🔕 Notifications have been disabled!
strk_notification_msg: 🔔 Notification about reaching the minimum threshold for claiming STRK rewards 🔔
show_notification_info: 📲 Notifications will be sent when {amount} STRK is available for claim 🚀
notification_menu_title: 🔔 Notification Menu: 🎁 STRK reward alerts: The bot will notify you as soon as the minimum set amount of tokens becomes available for claiming.
strk_notification: 🎁 STRK Notifications: Here you can: 🎯 Set up notification — the bot will notify you when the minimum token claim threshold is reached. 🚫 Disable notification — turn off current notifications. 🔍 Show current settings — check the current notification setup.
check_correct_validator_data: 🔍 Checking if such a validator exists...
check_correct_delegator_data: 🔍 Checking if such a delegator exists in the specified pool or if such a pool exists...
incorrect_validator_data: ❌ Error: Failed to retrieve information. The specified validator does not exist. Please check if the validator address is correct.
incorrect_delegator_data: ❌ Error: Failed to retrieve information. Please check if the delegator address is correct, the pool address is valid, and whether the delegator has delegated tokens to the pool.
rate_limit_warning: ⚠️ Rate limit exceeded! You have exceeded the limit of 30 commands per minute. Please wait a bit before sending more commands.
queue_position: ⏳ Your request has been added to the queue Current position in queue: {position} Please wait while your request is being processed.
queue_full: ⚠️ Request queue is full Please try again later.
request_already_processing: ⏳ Your previous request is still being processed Please wait until the current request is completed before sending a new one.
unpool_time: Tokens will be available for withdrawal:
request_in_queue: ⏳ Your request is being processed Please wait while we gather the information.
request_error: ❌ Error processing request Please try again later.
error_processing_request: ❌ An error occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.
language_change_blocked: ⏳ Language change is not available while your request is being processed Please wait until the current request is completed before changing the language.
attestation_healthy: Attesting on time — no missed epochs
operator_low_balance_alert: ⚠️ {label}: operator wallet has only {balance:.2f} STRK left (threshold: {threshold:.2f}). Top it up before the next attestation slot — running dry causes silent missed attestations.
operator_balance_recovered: ✅ {label}: operator wallet topped up — {balance:.2f} STRK now (threshold: {threshold:.2f}).
enter_operator_balance_threshold: Enter the minimum STRK balance for the operator wallet. You'll get a DM when it drops below this amount. Send 0 to disable.
operator_balance_threshold_set: ✅ Operator wallet alert set: {amount} STRK. You'll be DM'd as soon as it drops below this.
delegator_not_found: Delegator not found in this pool
enter_label: 🏷 How should I call this address? (short nickname for you — can be skipped)
enter_staker_address_for_delegator: 🛡 Enter the validator (staker) address: This is the address of the validator you delegated to. The bot will automatically find all pools (STRK and BTC wrappers) where you have a position.
enter_usd_threshold: 💵 Enter the USD threshold You'll get an alert when total unclaimed rewards (across all your tracked pools) reach this dollar amount. Set 0 to disable. Examples: 5, 10.5
enter_token_threshold: 🪙 Enter a per-token threshold Format: SYMBOL AMOUNT or AMOUNT SYMBOL — e.g. STRK 100, 100 STRK, or 100strk. Comma is allowed: 100,5 STRK. Use amount 0 to remove the threshold. Known symbols: {symbols} Note: staking rewards are always paid in STRK, so a per-token threshold is only meaningful for STRK.
threshold_err_empty: ❌ Empty input. Enter a symbol and amount, e.g. STRK 100.
threshold_err_missing_symbol: ❌ Missing token symbol. Add a symbol, e.g. STRK 100 or 100 STRK.
threshold_err_missing_amount: ❌ Missing amount. Add a number, e.g. STRK 100 or 100 STRK.
threshold_err_bad_number: ❌ Invalid number. Use an integer (100) or decimal (100.5 / 100,5).
threshold_err_too_many: ❌ Too many values. Only one symbol and one amount are expected, e.g. STRK 100.
attestation_alerts_enabled: ✅ Attestation alerts enabled. You will be notified within ~1 minute when any of your tracked validators misses an epoch.
attestation_submenu_prompt: 🛡 Attestation alerts per validator Tap a validator to toggle alerts for it. Tap “Enable all” / “Disable all” for bulk action.
duplicate_validator: ⚠️ This validator is already in your tracking list.
duplicate_delegation: ⚠️ This delegation (delegator + validator) is already in your tracking list.
confirm_delete_all_prompt: ⚠️ Delete ALL {count} tracked addresses? This cannot be undone.
